Services & packages

Productized services for businesses worldwide. Pick a package or mix & match — every project is shipped by one person, end to end.

3 tiers

Website Design & Build

A fast, modern, mobile-ready site on WordPress & Elementor — designed around your brand and built to convert.

  • Custom responsive design
  • Speed & mobile optimised
  • On-page SEO foundations
  • Launch & handover
Starter landingfrom $250
Business · 5 pagesfrom $650
WooCommerce storefrom $1,300
Audit + retainer

SEO & Growth

Get found on Google. Technical SEO, on-page, and white-hat link building — the approach I used to take new domains to Domain Rating 25.

  • Ahrefs / Semrush / Screaming Frog audit
  • Keyword & competitor research
  • On-page fixes + link building
  • Monthly reporting
SEO audit & action planfrom $250
Monthly SEO + linksfrom $450/mo
One-off★ Specialty

AI Search (AEO) Optimization

Be the answer AI gives. Get your business cited in ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, and Perplexity — not just ranked on Google.

  • AI-citation & visibility audit
  • Structured data / schema markup
  • Content restructured for AI extraction
  • Entity & FAQ optimisation
AEO setupfrom $350
Setup + retainer★ Specialty

AI Automation & Chatbots

Put the busywork on autopilot. Custom Make.com / n8n workflows and AI chatbots powered by Claude & OpenAI.

  • Workflow design & build
  • Content pipelines, lead routing, alerts
  • AI chatbot / FB-comment automation
  • Integrations + documentation
Workflow / chatbot setupfrom $300
Automation carefrom $250/mo
Setup + management

Performance Marketing

Campaigns that bring leads, not just clicks. I've managed ~RM300K in ad spend generating 25,000+ leads.

  • Account, pixel & tracking setup
  • Audience & creative strategy
  • A/B testing & optimisation
  • Clear performance reporting
Campaign setupfrom $300
Monthly managementfrom $450/mo
One-off fixes

Web Infrastructure & Email

The technical backbone. Hosting, migrations, and email that actually lands in the inbox — not spam.

  • Server / hosting setup (DigitalOcean, Cloudways)
  • DNS, SSL & zero-downtime migration
  • Email auth: DMARC / SPF / DKIM
  • Deliverability & spam fixes
Hosting setup / migrationfrom $150
Email deliverability fixfrom $150

Indicative starting prices in USD — final quote depends on scope. Custom bundles available.

Why work with me

One person who can design it, build it, ship it — and make it perform.

Most freelancers stop at the build. I take a site from first sketch to live, then grow it — the SEO that makes it rank, the automation that runs it, the ads that fill it. That full-stack range, across 25+ sites, 15+ industries, two countries, and new domains taken to Domain Rating 25, means fewer hands to coordinate and one person accountable for the result.
